decision_criteria.BLOCKED: Only for local candidate pipeline artifact/schema corruption.
decision_criteria.DISCARD: Variant collapses sample/fee/stress/worst-day, merely reproduces retrospective positive-condition removal, or residual/stress remains broad/worse.
decision_criteria.KEEP: Variant improves risk-adjusted economics or residual/stress versus late_repair90 control while retaining at least ~90% of seed_actions/pair_qty and keeping fee_after_pnl, stress100_worst_pnl, and worst_day_fee_after_pnl positive; blocks concentrate on risk-increasing negative-ledger states and are not summary-only removals.
decision_criteria.UNKNOWN: State-machine lacks exact pre-seed same/opposite qty, immediate pair opportunity, or online ledger fields; name exact missing fields and do not shadow.

frozen_families.name: exact_portfolio_ledger_diagnostic_3600s_shadow
frozen_families.not_frozen: public-profile paired-inventory remains research inspiration only, not promotion or canary evidence
frozen_families.reason: same-host no-order diagnostic reached sample and positive bare pair PnL, but failed normalized residual risk budget and conservative risk-adjusted proxies; transfer attribution found only summary-only positive-condition removal that destroys live sample.

frozen_families.name: late_repair90_fill_to_balance_after_90_shadow_family
frozen_families.reason: prior transfer-gap verifiers showed historical candidate-pipeline positives did not transfer to live/no-order window and same-window source fields are insufficient.

next_executable_action: Run local no-network dynamic_condition_ledger_risk_state_gate verifier from candidate_base/candidate_registry-compatible data; compare late_repair90 control vs variant on seed_actions, active_markets, pair_actions, pair_qty, weighted_pair_cost, gross_pnl, official_taker_fee, fee_after_pnl, stress100_worst_pnl, worst_day_fee_after_pnl, residual_qty_rate, residual_cost_rate, risk-state block counts, strict/public coverage, research_ranking and promotion_gate. Do not SSH or start EC2 shadow/canary before this verifier returns KEEP.

hard_blockers: no local dynamic risk-state verifier result yet
prior exact portfolio-ledger diagnostic shadow failed promotion risk budget

research_ranking.interpretation: This is a mechanism-selection KEEP, not economic KEEP. It freezes the failed exact shadow family and selects a concrete local verifier that can test a causal non-price inventory-path gate.
research_ranking.label: KEEP_PORTFOLIO_LEDGER_FREEZE_AND_DYNAMIC_RISK_STATE_GATE_SELECTED

prior_local_positive.label: KEEP_PUBLIC_PROFILE_PAIRED_INVENTORY_LOCAL_RANKER
notes: This is a local condition-ledger ranking verifier, not a trading-path implementation.
It does not use fill-to-balance90, public/source price caps, static target/cap sweeps, or cooldown/admission caps.
The public profile supports the account-level paired inventory hypothesis only as proxy research input.

prior_transfer_discard.label: DISCARD_PORTFOLIO_LEDGER_TRANSFER_BROAD_LIVE_RISK_SAMPLE_DESTROYED
notes: This is a local attribution result, not a new shadow or canary.
It discards the exact live/no-order transfer of the portfolio-ledger ranker, not the public profile as research inspiration.
Do not infer economic failure from bare pair PnL; pair_pnl was positive, but residual risk budget and conservative proxies failed.

candidate_base_config_to_compare.control: shadow_aligned_late_repair90 edge=0.07 target_qty=5 max_open_cost=80 imbalance_qty_cap=1.25 late_repair_only_after_s=90 no_fill_to_balance
candidate_base_config_to_compare.variant: same as control plus dynamic condition-ledger risk-state gate before each seed admission

gate_definition.allowed_after_negative_state: underweight repair, imbalance-reducing seeds, or seeds with immediate pair/offsetting effect remain allowed
gate_definition.blocked_after_negative_state: new risk-increasing seeds for that condition only; blocks must be counted as condition_ledger_risk_state
gate_definition.ledger_metric: condition-level conservative_risk_adjusted_proxy = pair_pnl - official_taker_fee - residual_cost_proxy - stress_cost_proxy
gate_definition.risk_increasing_seed: candidate would increase same-side overweight/exposure or residual_cost_proxy; exact implementation should use pre-seed same_qty/opposite_qty from the state machine, not public/source price
gate_definition.risk_state_trigger: condition becomes risk_adjusted_negative using online pre-seed ledger state or immediately prior ledger state available in rerun state machine

known_limits: candidate_registry exposes after-seed inventory fields; the verifier may need to rerun state-machine locally to capture exact pre-seed same/opposite qty and immediate pairing effect
same-window live/no-order source ordering remains unavailable, so this is historical candidate-pipeline research only
public account audit remains proxy truth, not private owner-trade truth
selected_next_mechanism.name: dynamic_condition_ledger_risk_state_gate
selected_next_mechanism.summary: Replay late_repair90 from candidate_base with an online condition ledger. Once a condition ledger turns conservative risk_adjusted_negative, block only new risk-increasing seeds for that condition while still allowing underweight repair, imbalance-reducing, or pairing-improving seeds. This tests whether the public-profile paired-inventory risk ledger can become a causal admission gate rather than a retrospective summary removal filter.
why_compliant: does not impose public/source price caps
does not sweep static target_qty or imbalance caps
does not use residual cooldown/admission caps
does not drop completed summary buckets after the fact
